text:
The Bounty Hunter was a Blacklist Hunter pursuing the Zoldyck Family. His actual name was undisclosed. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 24 (2011) 

Appearance

He was tall and had a large and muscular physique, with tanned skin, curly black hair, big thick eyebrows, and a handlebar mustache. He wore an eyepatch over his right eye, a fur-trimmed vest over a sleeveless shirt, a yellow bandana tied around his right arm, black gloves, a cloth sash, plain pants, and steel-toe boots. 

Personality

The Bounty Hunter had a dominating and intrepid personality, confident that he and his men could take on the Zoldyck Family by themselves. 

Background

The Bounty Hunter, who was after the bounties on the heads of the Zoldyck Family members, led a group of other hunters (including Seaquant) and trespassed into the Zoldyck property. With Mike restrained for the day, the Hunters were able to get as far as Canary's post, but the young apprentice butler easily defeated them. Zebro later appeared to dispatch the trespassers, feeding them to Mike. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

The Bounty Hunter makes a short appearance in a flashback. 

Equipment

Dual Blades: The Bounty Hunter prefers to use a pair of matching blades in combat. 

Hidden Kunai: The Bounty Hunter hides two kunai somewhere inside his mouth and uses them by ejecting the weapons from his mouth as a surprise attack. 

Abilities & Powers

Given his status as a fully-recognized Hunter with several henchmen or followers, it is safe to assume he has decent combat skills. He also seems to be adequate in dual-wielding two blades. 

Nen

As a Pro-Hunter, he was capable of using Nen, although it was never clearly shown.

Battles

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

He is a 2011 anime adaptation-only character, appearing in neither the manga nor the 1999 anime adaptation.
